name: Travel bag
description:
🖤 Authentic Vintage Hermès Canvas Work & Travel Tote

A timeless and highly versatile authentic vintage Hermès canvas tote, designed for effortless everyday luxury. Crafted in durable black canvas with signature striped woven web handles, this rare and practical piece blends iconic French craftsmanship with understated sophistication.

Perfect as a work tote, travel bag, or everyday carryall, this structured yet lightweight design features exterior slip pockets for easy-access essentials and a roomy interior ideal for documents, laptops, weekend items, or daily necessities. Finished with a secure snap closure, this tote is both functional and elegant—true to Hermès’ heritage of refined utility.

A beautiful investment piece for collectors and those who appreciate discreet luxury.

✨ Details:
	•	Brand: Hermès
	•	Authentic vintage piece
	•	Color: Black with striped webbed handles
	•	Material: Durable canvas
	•	Closure: Snap button
	•	Exterior slip pockets
	•	Comfortable top handles
	•	Structured yet flexible silhouette
	•	Ideal for work, travel, or daily use

📦 Condition:

Gently pre-owned, in good vintage condition with light signs of wear consistent with age and careful use. Canvas remains strong and structured. Clean interior.

✅ 100% Authentic Hermès – Guaranteed
